payload.answer: I have an existing memory that Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I won’t replace the existing relationship without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The name Sara matches the existing person, but the new relationship conflicts with the existing stored relationship.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new relationship claims.

repair_options: Confirm that Sara is your daughter and the niece statement is incorrect.

Clarify whether there are two different people named Sara.
